auditScope: T-05B — Portfolio Walk-Forward Backtest Skeleton v2

gaps: compute_regime_for_date() inlines its own regime logic (not using persisted MarketRegimeResult)

typeScriptWalkForwardValidator.reason: Per-signal walk-forward only. References retired H001-H012 experiment registry. Must NOT be used in T-05B.

persistedMarketRegimeResult.contract: Read-only DB query. No writes. Uses resolveCurrentDate().

resolveCurrentDate.usage: resolveCurrentDate(input?) — must use in T-05B. Eliminates hardcoded date cap.
resolveCurrentDate.contract: Pure function. No DB. No external API. Falls back to system date on invalid input.

rationale: T-05B must be TypeScript, use resolveCurrentDate(), inject PersistedRegimeContext (no direct DB in engine), and never reference H001-H012.
